source_name: ZTF public alert archive (University of Washington)
cadence: Pulled via `Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py --nights 18 --limit 90000` (default `--per-night-limit` = ceil(90000/18) = 5000), confirmed by direct inspection to span 18 distinct real archive nights (20260622 through 20260709 inclusive), each contributing exactly 5000 alerts (the per-night cap) -- this closes the v1 manifest's `cadence` caveat that the exact calendar nights were not recoverable.
band_or_frequency: ZTF g/r/i filters; per-alert `fid` (filter ID) preserved in this sample (unlike v1)
data_product_type: difference-image alert cutout triplets (science/reference/difference, base64-encoded FITS) with ZTF broker real/bogus (rb) and deep-learning real/bogus (drb) scores, plus per-alert object_id/candid/jd/ra/dec/fid/field/archive_night provenance (v0.90.74 fix)
license: Not independently verified in project records. ZTF public alert archive (ztf.uw.edu) provides unauthenticated public HTTP access; no explicit license file or terms-of-use document was located during Gate Z3 source verification (docs/evidence/phase0/2026-07-02-gate-z3-uw-alert-archive-candidate.md).
label_source: ZTF broker-side real/bogus classifier (Duev et al. 2019 style rb/drb scores), binarized by Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py into this dataset's real/bogus label
preprocessing_version: Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py (v0.90.76 per-night-cap fix, gzip-FITS cutouts decompressed to raw float32); consumed by Skills/build_cutout_dataset.py to build data/cutouts_v3/index.csv for models/tier2_cnn_v3.pt training
known_caveats: This dataset resolves the v1 manifest's known_caveats: real per-alert object_id/candid/jd/ra/dec/fid/field/archive_night metadata IS preserved (confirmed by direct inspection: 90,000 records, 73,560 distinct object_id values, 18 distinct archive_night values), so a genuine grouped-split leakage report by object_id/night/sky-cell was reconstructed for real -- see Logs/reports/tier2_cnn_v3_grouped_split_report.json and docs/evidence/a7/2026-07-10-fifth-attempt-grouped-split-report-passes-under-revised-policy.md.
Real class balance (from console output during the real 2026-07-10 calibration run): 71,129 real / 18,871 bogus across the 90,000 alerts (rb-threshold-derived label).

10.4% of distinct objects (7,645/73,560) are detected on more than one of the 18 nights -- a real, physical ZTF repeat-detection rate, documented in docs/evidence/a7/2026-07-10-fourth-attempt-scale-test-confirms-structural-incompatibility.md as the reason night_key/sky_cell moved from hard-gating to monitored-only in src/grouped_splits.py.
The raw file itself is gitignored/local-only (5.75GB) and is not in git history, matching the v1 manifest's storage pattern -- checksum above is the reproducibility anchor.
